title: Codex Consult Response
description: Structured response when Claude asks Codex to weigh in on a design-decision question during brainstorming or plan writing.

analysis.description: One-paragraph reading of the question and the surrounding context. State what is actually being decided and what constraints matter.

endorsed_existing.description: Zero or more of Claude's original options that Codex considers viable, with a terse rationale each. Use the exact option label Claude provided.

rejected_existing.description: Zero or more of Claude's original options that Codex does NOT endorse, with a one-line reason each. Use the exact option label Claude provided.

new_options.description: Zero or more additional options Codex proposes that Claude did not list.

label.description: Short label, fit for an AskUserQuestion option (e.g. 'Postgres row-level security').

description.description: 1-2 sentences stating what the option is.

rationale.description: Why this option beats the existing ones, or when it would be preferable.

recommendation.description: Codex's single top pick across endorsed_existing and new_options. Label must match exactly.

open_questions.description: Optional: questions Codex would want answered before it would commit harder to a recommendation. One per item.
